desc: A small brown rabbit nibbles at the weeds pushing through the untended soil. Its ears swivel at every sound, ready to bolt at the first sign of danger.
A small rabbit crouches between the rows of golden wheat, nibbling on fallen grain. It watches you with bright, wary eyes.
A rabbit sits among the cotton plants, its brown fur dusted with white fibres. It twitches its nose at you before returning to nibbling on a leaf.
